---
title: "factories.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\.agents\scripts\empire\factories.py"
loc: 33
complexity: 3
logic_score: 4.02
style_score: 3.86
intel_score: 8.67
overall_score: 5.36
---

## Intent
The `factories.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on create_warlord, create_scenario, create_vector_engine. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via create_warlord, create_scenario, create_vector_engine. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [odin_protocol.engine.models](file://odin_protocol.engine.models)

### Exports
- `create_warlord`
- `create_scenario`
- `create_vector_engine`
